name: Clinical Value Agent
description: Assesses pharmaceutical value propositions for clinical evidence strength: mechanism of action clarity, efficacy data robustness, safety narrative completeness, and clinical trial references (NCT numbers). Activated only in value_proposition query mode.

provider.organization: Bayer AG — LLM Council Agent Team

skills.name: Mechanism of Action Clarity Check
skills.description: Detects mechanism of action descriptions via keywords: 'mechanism of action', 'moa', 'binds to', 'inhibits', 'activates', 'stabiliz', 'pathway', 'receptor', 'target'. Rich (4+) vs absent (0) MoA narrative.
examples: Assess whether the tafamidis value proposition clearly explains TTR tetramer stabilisation

skills.name: Efficacy Data Strength Assessment
skills.description: Scores efficacy evidence: 'efficacy', 'hazard ratio', 'p-value', 'p<', 'confidence interval', 'relative risk', 'absolute risk', 'NNT', 'endpoint', 'primary outcome'. Data-rich (5+) vs qualitative-only (0).

skills.name: Safety Narrative Assessment
skills.description: Reviews safety language: 'safety profile', 'well-tolerated', 'adverse event', 'side effect', 'contraindication', 'black box', 'warning', 'monitoring'. Comprehensive (4+) vs minimal mention (0).

skills.name: Clinical Trial Reference Detection
skills.description: Extracts NCT (National Clinical Trial) identifiers from the synthesis text using regex pattern NCT\d{8}. Each NCT number is reported individually for verification against ClinicalTrials.gov.
